title: SOAR IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES/PCC IMMIGRATION CLINIC - 211info
text: PORTLAND COMMUNITY COLLEGE CASCADE CAMPUS SOAR IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES/PCC IMMIGRATION CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal services such as immigration screenings, representation for Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) renewals and Employment Authorization Document (EAD) applications, and guidance on Advance Parole eligibility and the application process. Offer workshops on DACA, Advance Parole, and other immigration law updates. Provides possible immigration options and referrals to legal partners for support. 705 N Killingsworth Portland, OR 97217 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Prioritizes Portland Community College (PCC) students. Hours: 2nd, 3rd, and 4th Thursday of the month 9am-4pm by appointment only Email (503) 379-0964 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 379-0964 Kayla Asakawa Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to fill out intake form and schedule an appointment. Program may have a waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services Workshops/Symposiums * Immigration Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - PORTLAND COMMUNITY COLLEGE FOOD - PANTHER PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND COMMUNITY COLLEGE CASCADE CAMPUS
